title: Let Him Cook
description: A 1.20.1 food based modpack with some QoL mods
body:
Let him cook, as the name suggest is a food based vanilla+ modpack.

It contains a lot of addons to farmer's delight as well as some of the Let's Do series.

(as well as decoration's delight that isn't part of the modpack so here's the link if you want the full experience : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decoration-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decoration-delight))

Here are some screenshots taken with the modpack to show what a survival with it might look like :)

![Let him cook prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6ca3f4986cd759bf55a38621a12722be0476612.jpeg)

![Let him cook prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/419d6641b5f4159da87f8b8ef163539e1618db08.jpeg)

![Let him cook prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91142de61f9bb43f9534d83df1ad12a5949355c6.jpeg)

![Let him cook prev4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51f234b83b911a5bde6a5fed3d119c5f43df7720.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
